steps: Contact Nordea Custody to report the under-withholding error on Nokia Oyj dividend - they withheld 13.5% instead of the correct 15% treaty rate
Request Nordea to remit the additional EUR 3,607.50 tax to Finnish tax authority (Vero) on behalf of the client
Obtain confirmation from Nordea that the corrected withholding has been processed and reported to Vero
If Nordea cannot process the correction, client must remit EUR 3,607.50 directly to Vero using Form 6163e/6164e

references.title: Vero – Payments of Dividends to Nonresidents
